All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AccessPolicy
Access policy describing who may decrypt which streams in an .tio file.
AccessUnit
Transport-layer Access Unit: one spectrum as a transport payload.
AcquisitionRun
An ordered collection of spectra from one acquisition, with instrument config, spectrum index, and optional chromatograms.
AcquisitionSimulator
Synthetic LC-MS acquisition simulator.
AlignedRead
One aligned sequencing read — the genomic analogue of MassSpectrum.
Anonymizer
Applies caller-selected policies to a dataset and writes a new .tio file.
Anonymizer.AnonymizationPolicy
 
Anonymizer.AnonymizationResult
 
Anonymizer.MaskRegion
M90.3: a single masked region (chromosome + half-open interval).
AUFilter
Server-side filter predicate applied to every AccessUnit before serialisation.
AxisDescriptor
Describes a single axis of a SignalArray: its semantic name, unit, numeric range, and sampling mode.
BamDump
BamDump — canonical-JSON dump of a SAM/BAM file for the M87 cross-language conformance harness.
BamReader
SAM/BAM importer — M87.
BamReader.SamtoolsNotFoundException
Raised at first use when samtools is missing or unusable.
BamWriter
BAM exporter — M88.
BasePack
BASE_PACK genomic-sequence codec — 2-bit ACGT + sidecar mask.
BrukerTDFReader
Bruker timsTOF .d importer
BrukerTDFReader.BrukerTDFException
Raised when the binary extraction path is requested but the Python delegate cannot be located or execution fails.
BrukerTDFReader.Metadata
SQLite-level metadata snapshot — no binary extraction required.
CanonicalJson
v0.7 M51 — deterministic JSON formatter for cross-language compound byte-parity.
ChannelData
One signal channel inside an AccessUnit.
Chromatogram
Chromatogram: time-vs-intensity trace.
CipherSuite
Cipher-suite catalog and algorithm-dispatched parameter helpers (v0.7 M48).
CipherSuite.Category
Category tag for catalog entries.
CipherSuite.Entry
Catalog entry.
CipherSuite.InvalidKeyException
Thrown when a key's length does not match the selected algorithm.
CipherSuite.Status
Status tag; only CipherSuite.Status.ACTIVE algorithms may be used for encrypt / sign / wrap operations.
CipherSuite.UnsupportedAlgorithmException
Thrown when a caller specifies an algorithm not in the catalog, or one with status RESERVED (activates in a later milestone).
CompoundField
One field inside a compound-dataset record.
CompoundField.Kind
Field kinds supported by the capability floor.
CramReader
CRAM importer — M88.
CramWriter
CRAM exporter — M88.
CVAnnotatable
Objects implementing CVAnnotatable can be tagged with controlled-vocabulary parameters from any ontology (PSI-MS, nmrCV, CHEBI, BFO, ...).
CVParam
A single controlled-vocabulary parameter reference.
CVTermMapper
Maps PSI-MS and nmrCV controlled-vocabulary accessions to TTIO model values (precision, compression, array role, spectrum metadata).
DeltaRans
DELTA_RANS_ORDER0 codec (M95, codec id 11).
DumpIdentifications
v0.7 M51 — compound parity dumper.
EncodingSpec
Describes how a SignalArray buffer is encoded on disk: numeric precision, compression algorithm, and byte order.
Encryptable
Objects implementing Encryptable support MPEG-G-style multi-level content protection.
EncryptedTransport
v1.0 transport layer for per-AU encrypted files.
EncryptionManager
AES-256-GCM encryption/decryption for TTI-O datasets.
EncryptionManager.EncryptResult
Result of an encryption operation.
EncryptionManager.WrappedBlobV2
Parsed v1.2 wrapped-key blob fields.
Enums
Enumerations mirroring the ObjC TTIOEnums.h integer values.
Enums.AcquisitionMode
High-level acquisition scheme for a run.
Enums.ActivationMethod
MS/MS precursor activation (dissociation) method.
Enums.ByteOrder
Byte order of a signal buffer on disk.
Enums.ChromatogramType
Chromatogram kind.
Enums.Compression
Compression algorithm applied to a signal buffer.
Enums.EncryptionLevel
Multi-level protection granularity (MPEG-G style).
Enums.IRMode
Infrared y-axis interpretation (transmittance vs.
Enums.Polarity
Ion polarity for mass spectrometry.
Enums.Precision
Numeric precision of a signal buffer.
Enums.SamplingMode
Axis sampling regularity.
Feature
A feature-level observation: a peak detected in one run, with retention time + m/z + charge + per-sample abundances.
FeatureFlags
Reader/writer for TTI-O feature flags stored as root group attributes.
FqzcompNx16Z
FQZCOMP_NX16.Z — CRAM-mimic (rANS-Nx16) lossless quality codec (M94.Z).
FqzcompNx16Z.ContextParams
Bit-pack context parameters (defaults: qbits=12, pbits=2, dbits=0, sloc=14).
FqzcompNx16Z.DecodeResult
 
FqzcompNx16Z.EncodeOptions
Encoder options bag.
FreeInductionDecay
NMR free-induction decay.
GenomicIndex
Per-read offsets, lengths, positions, mapping qualities, flags, and chromosome strings for one GenomicRun.
GenomicRun
Lazy view over one /study/genomic_runs/<name>/ group.
Hdf5CompoundIO
Write/read helper for the fixed compound metadata datasets described in format-spec §6.
Hdf5CompoundIO.Field
 
Hdf5CompoundIO.FieldKind
 
Hdf5CompoundIO.RowPacker
Packs row values into the compound byte slot.
Hdf5CompoundIO.Schema
 
Hdf5CompoundType
Thin wrapper around an HDF5 compound datatype (H5T_COMPOUND).
Hdf5Dataset
Thin wrapper around a 1-D HDF5 dataset.
Hdf5Errors
Exception hierarchy for HDF5 wrapper operations.
Hdf5Errors.AttributeException
 
Hdf5Errors.DatasetCreateException
 
Hdf5Errors.DatasetOpenException
 
Hdf5Errors.DatasetReadException
 
Hdf5Errors.DatasetWriteException
 
Hdf5Errors.FileCreateException
 
Hdf5Errors.FileNotFoundException
 
Hdf5Errors.FileOpenException
 
Hdf5Errors.GroupCreateException
 
Hdf5Errors.GroupOpenException
 
Hdf5Errors.Hdf5Exception
 
Hdf5Errors.OutOfRangeException
 
Hdf5File
Thin wrapper around an HDF5 file handle.
Hdf5Group
Thin wrapper around an HDF5 group handle.
Hdf5Provider
HDF5 storage provider.
Identification
A spectrum-level chemical-entity identification.
ImzMLReader
imzML + .ibd importer
ImzMLReader.ImzMLBinaryException
Raised when the .ibd binary disagrees with the .imzML metadata (UUID mismatch or offset overflow).
ImzMLReader.ImzMLImport
Result of parsing an imzML + .ibd pair.
ImzMLReader.ImzMLParseException
Raised when the imzML XML is structurally invalid for our needs.
ImzMLReader.PixelSpectrum
One pixel's spatial coordinates plus its m/z + intensity arrays.
ImzMLWriter
imzML + .ibd exporter — v0.9+.
ImzMLWriter.WriteResult
Return value of ImzMLWriter.write(java.util.List<global.thalion.ttio.importers.ImzMLReader.PixelSpectrum>, java.nio.file.Path, java.nio.file.Path, java.lang.String, int, int, int, double, double, java.lang.String, java.lang.String): resolved paths + UUID.
Indexable<T>
Objects implementing Indexable support O(1) random access by integer index and, optionally, by key or range.
InstrumentConfig
Immutable instrument configuration value class.
IRImage
Infrared hyperspectral imaging dataset: width × height pixel grid, each pixel an IR spectrum of spectralPoints intensity values sampled at a shared wavenumber axis.
IRSpectrum
1-D infrared spectrum: wavenumber + intensity arrays plus mode (absorbance vs.
ISAExporter
Exports a SpectralDataset to ISA-Tab TSV files and ISA-JSON.
IsolationWindow
Precursor isolation window for MS/MS scans, expressed as a target m/z with asymmetric lower/upper offsets in Th (Da).
JcampDxDecode
JCAMP-DX 5.01 compressed-XYDATA decoder (SQZ / DIF / DUP / PAC).
JcampDxDecode.DecodedXY
Decoded XYDATA: two equal-length primitive arrays.
JcampDxEncoding
JCAMP-DX 5.01 ##XYDATA=(X++(Y..Y)) encoding modes supported by JcampDxWriter.
JcampDxReader
JCAMP-DX 5.01 reader for 1-D vibrational and UV-Vis spectra.
JcampDxWriter
JCAMP-DX 5.01 writer for 1-D Raman, IR, and UV-Vis spectra.
KeyRotationManager
Envelope encryption and key rotation for TTI-O datasets.
M94zV4Cli
Tiny CLI mirroring objc/Tools/TtioM94zV4Cli.m and the Python harness for cross-language byte-equality tests.
MassSpectrum
A mass spectrum: m/z + intensity arrays plus MS level, polarity, scan window, and optional precursor activation / isolation metadata.
MateInfoV2
mate_info v2 — CRAM-style inline mate-pair codec (codec id 13).
MateInfoV2.Triple
Decoded result tuple.
MateInfoV2Cli
Tiny CLI mirroring objc/Tools/TtioMateInfoV2Cli.m (T10) and the Python ctypes path for cross-language byte-equality tests (T11).
MemoryProvider
In-memory storage provider.
MiniJson
Minimal JSON parser/encoder for the compound-metadata JSON attribute fallback path (§6 of format-spec).
MSImage
Imaging mass spectrometry dataset with spatial grid and tile access.
MzMLParseException
Thrown when an mzML document cannot be parsed: malformed XML, missing required elements, or unsupported schema features.
MzMLReader
SAX-based mzML 1.1 parser.
MzMLWriter
Writes an AcquisitionRun as indexedmzML.
MzTabReader
mzTab importer
MzTabReader.MzTabImport
In-memory representation of a parsed mzTab document.
MzTabReader.MzTabParseException
Raised when the mzTab document is structurally invalid.
MzTabWriter
mzTab exporter — v0.9+.
MzTabWriter.WriteResult
Paths + per-section row counts.
NameTokenizedV2Cli
NAME_TOKENIZED v2 CLI for cross-language byte-equality tests.
NameTokenizerV2
NAME_TOKENIZED v2 (codec id 15) — column-aware tokenised read-name codec.
NativeBytesPool
Pool of sun.misc.Unsafe-allocated byte blobs for VL_BYTES compound fields.
NativeStringPool
Pool of sun.misc.Unsafe-allocated, UTF-8 encoded, null-terminated C strings.
NMR2DSpectrum
2-D NMR spectrum: row-major double[] intensity matrix of width × height points plus F1 and F2 axis descriptors.
NmrMLParseException
Thrown when an nmrML document cannot be parsed.
NmrMLReader
SAX-based parser for nmrML files.
NmrMLReader.NmrMLResult
Parse result bundling the AcquisitionRun and optional FID.
NmrMLWriter
Writes an AcquisitionRun as nmrML.
NMRSpectrum
1-D NMR spectrum: chemical-shift + intensity arrays plus nucleus type and spectrometer frequency in MHz.
NumpressCodec
Numpress-delta codec for near-lossless compression of spectral data.
NumpressCodec.EncodedResult
 
PacketHeader
24-byte packet header for the TTI-O transport format.
PacketType
Transport packet types.
PerAUCli
Cross-language conformance CLI for v1.0 per-AU encryption.
PerAUEncryption
v1.0 per-Access-Unit encryption primitives.
PerAUEncryption.AUHeaderPlaintext
Plaintext form of the 36-byte AU semantic header.
PerAUEncryption.ChannelSegment
One encrypted row of a <channel>_segments compound dataset.
PerAUEncryption.GcmResult
Result of a per-AU encryption: (iv, tag, ciphertext).
PerAUEncryption.HeaderSegment
One encrypted row of spectrum_index/au_header_segments.
PerAUFile
v1.0 file-level per-Access-Unit encryption orchestrator.
PerAUFile.DecryptedRun
Result of PerAUFile.decryptFile(java.lang.String, byte[], java.lang.String): per-run, per-channel plaintext bytes; optional auHeaders list when opt_encrypted_au_headers is set.
PerAUFile.GenomicIndexPlain
M90.11: plaintext genomic_index columns recovered from a file encrypted with the reserved "_headers" key.
PostQuantumCrypto
Post-quantum crypto primitives — ML-KEM-1024 (FIPS 203) and ML-DSA-87 (FIPS 204).
PostQuantumCrypto.KemEncapResult
Encapsulation result: KEM ciphertext and the shared secret.
PostQuantumCrypto.KeyPair
Immutable raw-bytes keypair.
PQCTool
Cross-language PQC conformance CLI
ProtectionMetadata
ProtectionMetadata packet payload (v0.10 M71) per docs/transport-spec.md §4.4.
Provenanceable
Objects implementing Provenanceable carry a W3C PROV-compatible chain of processing records.
ProvenanceJsonParse
Phase 1 (post-M91) helper that parses the JSON-array shape used by the per-run provenance_json attribute on both AcquisitionRun (MS / NMR) and GenomicRun (genomic) on-disk groups.
ProvenanceRecord
A single provenance step describing how data was produced or transformed.
ProviderRegistry
Provider registry + factory.
Quality
QUALITY_BINNED genomic quality-score codec — Illumina-8 bin table.
Quantification
An abundance observation for a chemical entity in a sample.
Query
Compressed-domain query over a SpectrumIndex.
RamanImage
Raman hyperspectral imaging dataset: width × height pixel grid, each pixel a Raman spectrum of spectralPoints intensity values sampled at a shared wavenumber axis.
RamanSpectrum
1-D Raman spectrum: wavenumber + intensity arrays plus laser excitation / power / integration metadata.
Rans
rANS entropy codec — order-0 and order-1.
RefDiffV2
REF_DIFF v2 — CRAM-style bit-packed sequence diff codec (codec id 14).
RefDiffV2.BlobHeader
Minimal header extracted from a refdiff_v2 blob.
RefDiffV2.Pair
Decoded result pair: concatenated sequences and offset table.
RefDiffV2Cli
CLI tool for ref_diff v2 cross-language byte-equality tests.
ReferenceResolver
Resolve a reference chromosome sequence for REF_DIFF decode.
RefMissingException
Raised when a reference required for REF_DIFF decode cannot be resolved.
Run
Modality-agnostic surface shared by every run type — mass-spectrometry, NMR, FID, MSImage, and genomic.
SamReader
Convenience subclass of BamReader for SAM input.
SignalArray
The atomic unit of measured signal in TTI-O.
SignatureManager
HMAC-SHA256 signatures with v2 canonical little-endian format for TTI-O datasets.
SimulatorCli
Command-line simulator entrypoint.
SpectralDataset
Root reader/writer for TTI-O .tio files.
Spectrum
Base class for any spectrum.
SpectrumIndex
Compressed-domain query index for spectra in an acquisition run.
SqliteProvider
SQLite-backed storage provider for TTI-O.
StorageDataset
One 1-D typed array or compound-record array.
StorageGroup
Named directory of subgroups, datasets, and attributes.
StorageProvider
Storage backend entry point.
StorageProvider.Mode
Open modes mirroring h5py semantics.
Streamable<T>
Objects implementing Streamable support sequential access with explicit positioning.
StreamReader
Sequential reader for a single MS run inside an .tio file.
StreamWriter
Incrementally append mass spectra to an .tio file.
ThermoRawException
Thrown when the ThermoRawFileParser delegation fails: binary not found, unsupported .raw file, or conversion produces unparseable mzML.
ThermoRawReader
Thermo .raw importer — M38.
TransitionList
Ordered list of SRM/MRM transitions.
TransitionList.Transition
One SRM/MRM transition.
TransportClient
Java client for the TTI-O streaming transport protocol (v0.10 M68).
TransportDecodeCli
Decode an TTI-O transport stream into a .tio file.
TransportEncodeCli
Encode a .tio file as an TTI-O transport stream.
TransportReader
Deserialises a transport byte stream into TransportReader.PacketRecord values or materializes the stream into a SpectralDataset.
TransportReader.PacketRecord
One parsed packet as header + payload.
TransportServer
WebSocket transport server (v0.10 M68.5 parity backfill).
TransportServerCli
Command-line transport server.
TransportWriter
Serialises an SpectralDataset as a transport byte stream.
TtioRansNative
JNI bridge to libttio_rans native library.
TtioRansNative.ContextResolver
Per-symbol context resolver used by TtioRansNative.decodeBlockStreaming(byte[], int, int[][], int[][], byte[], int, global.thalion.ttio.codecs.TtioRansNative.ContextResolver).
TtioReaderException
Base type for importer failures (mzML, nmrML, Thermo RAW).
TtioVerify
Java equivalent of the Objective-C TtioVerify CLI.
TtioWriteGenomicFixture
One-shot fixture writer used by the M82.4 cross-language conformance matrix.
TwoDCos
2D-COS compute primitives — Noda's synchronous / asynchronous decomposition from a perturbation series (Hilbert-transform approach).
TwoDimensionalCorrelationSpectrum
2D correlation spectrum (Noda 2D-COS): synchronous + asynchronous rank-2 correlation matrices sharing a single spectral-variable axis (ν1 = ν2).
UVVisSpectrum
1-D UV-visible absorption spectrum: wavelength (nm) and absorbance channels plus path-length and solvent metadata.
ValueRange
Closed numeric range [minimum, maximum].
Verifier
High-level verification API.
Verifier.Status
Sign-and-verify cycle outcome.
WatersMassLynxReader
Waters MassLynx .raw directory importer
WatersMassLynxReader.WatersMassLynxException
Raised when the converter exits non-zero or produces no mzML.
WrittenGenomicRun
Write-side container for a single genomic run, passed to SpectralDataset.writeMinimal.
ZarrProvider
Zarr v3 storage provider.
